## What changed

Describe your changes in 1-3 sentences.

## Why

What problem does this solve or what does it improve?

## Type

- [ ] Documentation fix/improvement
- [ ] New device report
- [ ] New use case or workflow
- [ ] Script improvement
- [ ] Other

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes (device, commands run, etc).

## Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or credentials in the diff
- [ ] Commands/scripts tested on an actual device
- [ ] Documentation is clear and accurate
